changes.description: CRITICAL: Field 'evidence_confidence' narrowed from number to integer. Example: float 0.0-1.0 -> int 0-100 causes data loss and breaks all downstream consumers expecting float precision. This is the most dangerous schema change class.

old_clause.description: Confidence score from automaton-auditor detective evidence. Must remain 0.0-1.0 float. BREAKING if changed to 0-100 integer scale.

new_clause.description: Confidence score. Changed to 0-100 integer scale.
